sentences.arabic: تَحْتَلُّ اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مَكَانَةً مُقَدَّسَةً عِنْدَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ لِأَنَّهَا لُغَةُ الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik zauzima sveto mjesto kod muslimana jer je to jezik Kur'ana Plemenitog.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language holds a sacred status among Muslims because it is the language of the Holy Quran.
